paracetamol.used_for: Fever and mild to moderate pain such as headache, body pain, and menstrual cramps.
paracetamol.simple_explanation: Paracetamol works by reducing pain signals in the brain and lowering fever.
paracetamol.safe_dosage: 1 tablet (500 mg) every 6–8 hours after food if needed
paracetamol.eli5_explanation: This medicine helps bring down fever and reduce pain so your body feels better.

ibuprofen.used_for: Pain, inflammation, menstrual cramps, and fever.
ibuprofen.simple_explanation: Ibuprofen reduces inflammation and blocks chemicals in the body that cause pain and swelling.
ibuprofen.safe_dosage: 1 tablet (200–400 mg) every 8 hours after food for up to 5 days
food_interactions: Avoid alcohol as it increases stomach irritation.
ibuprofen.eli5_explanation: This medicine reduces swelling and pain so you feel more comfortable.
ibuprofen.warning: Avoid during pregnancy especially in the third trimester

aspirin.used_for: Pain relief, fever reduction, and preventing blood clots.
aspirin.simple_explanation: Aspirin works by reducing inflammation and preventing blood platelets from sticking together.
aspirin.safe_dosage: 1 tablet (75–325 mg) once daily after food if prescribed
food_interactions: Avoid alcohol to reduce stomach bleeding risk.
aspirin.eli5_explanation: This medicine helps reduce pain and also keeps blood flowing smoothly.
aspirin.pcos_note: Low dose may be prescribed by doctor only
aspirin.warning: Do not take during pregnancy without doctor advice

metformin.simple_explanation: Metformin lowers blood sugar levels by improving how your body responds to insulin.
metformin.safe_dosage: 1 tablet (500 mg) twice daily after meals
metformin.eli5_explanation: This medicine helps your body control sugar levels in the blood.
metformin.cycle_effects: May help regulate periods in PCOS

folic acid.used_for: Preventing anemia and supporting pregnancy health.
folic acid.simple_explanation: Folic acid helps your body make healthy red blood cells and supports fetal development.
folic acid.safe_dosage: 1 tablet (400–800 mcg) once daily after food
folic acid.eli5_explanation: This vitamin helps your body make healthy blood and supports pregnancy.

iron tablets.simple_explanation: Iron supplements help your body produce more healthy red blood cells.
food_interactions: Avoid taking with milk or calcium supplements.
iron tablets.eli5_explanation: This medicine helps increase iron in your blood so you feel less tired.
iron tablets.cycle_effects: Helps with heavy period related anemia

levothyroxine.simple_explanation: Levothyroxine replaces the thyroid hormone your body lacks.
levothyroxine.safe_dosage: 1 tablet once daily in the morning on an empty stomach
food_interactions: Avoid taking with calcium or iron supplements within 2 hours.
levothyroxine.eli5_explanation: This medicine replaces the thyroid hormone your body needs to stay healthy.
levothyroxine.warning: Take on empty stomach 30 minutes before food

amoxicillin.used_for: Bacterial infections such as throat infection or urinary infection.
amoxicillin.safe_dosage: 1 capsule (500 mg) three times daily after food for 5 days
amoxicillin.eli5_explanation: This antibiotic helps kill harmful bacteria in your body.

azithromycin.used_for: Respiratory infections, throat infections, and some bacterial infections.
azithromycin.safe_dosage: 1 tablet (500 mg) once daily for 3 days
azithromycin.eli5_explanation: This antibiotic stops bacteria from multiplying so your body can recover.

vitamin d.used_for: Vitamin D deficiency and bone health.
vitamin d.simple_explanation: Vitamin D helps your body absorb calcium and keeps bones strong.
vitamin d.safe_dosage: 1 tablet once weekly after food or as prescribed
vitamin d.eli5_explanation: This vitamin helps keep your bones strong and healthy.

calcium.used_for: Bone health and preventing calcium deficiency.
food_interactions: Avoid taking at same time as iron tablets.
calcium.eli5_explanation: This supplement helps keep bones strong.
calcium.warning: Do not take at same time as iron tablets

cetirizine.used_for: Allergies such as sneezing, runny nose, and itching.
cetirizine.simple_explanation: Cetirizine blocks histamine which causes allergic symptoms.
food_interactions: Avoid alcohol as it increases drowsiness.
cetirizine.eli5_explanation: This medicine stops allergic reactions that cause sneezing and itching.
